text: What is the most important regulatory requirement for the master arriving at the lightering position?

options.text: Lightering of Oil and Hazardous Material Cargoes Pre-arrival notices.
Factors considered in designating lightering zones.

explanation: Lightering involves transferring cargo between ships at sea. The Master must adhere to strict regulatory requirements regarding pre-arrival notices to ensure the operation is authorized, safe, and complies with environmental pollution prevention standards.
